name: Menthuthuyoupi
description: Mentsutsuyupi, nicknamed Yupi, is the third of the chimera ant king's Royal Guard. Mentsutsuyupi is the largest of the Royal Guards and the only non-human hybrid among them, mixed with the genes of a magical beast instead. He is the most straightforward of the royal guards and possesses a strength that comes from complete selflessness and devotion to the King. name: Rosa Ushiromiya
description: Kinzo's fourth child. As the youngest of her siblings, she has the least influence at the family conference. Her husband abandoned her shortly before the birth of her daughter and only child, Maria. Rosa is the president of a small design company, "Anti-Rosa", which has recently begun to flounder, and she thus seeks out Kinzo's inheritance to pay off her co-endorsers. name: Seri Awashima
description: __Height:__ 170 cm She acts as Munakata's right arm, coldly carrying out her missions. Seri appears to be somewhat passive, though seemingly indifferent about others' civil rights. She prefers to use different alternatives in dire situations rather than killing as a first option. She's a regular at Izumo's bar and she likes her martinis with red bean paste. (Source: ANN, K Project Wikia)

name: Terminus Est
description: Est is Kamito's contracted spirit. She is a powerful sword spirit. In elemental waffe form she transforms into a sword known as Demon Slayer, Demon King Killing Sacred Sword, or The Sacred Sword of Severian.

name: Atsuhiro  Sako
description: Mr. Compress's Quirk allows him to "compress" anything in a spherical area into a small marble without actually damaging it. The weight of the target is reduced alongside them, making them very easy to carry. If used on a person, it effectively entraps them, terminating the fight instantly and allowing Mr. Compress to abduct them without difficulty. The Quirk can also be used on select body parts, maiming the target.

name: Blue
description: __Current Team:__ ~!Blastoise, Wigglytuff, Clefable, Ditto, Granbull, Nidoqueen!~ Blue is a sneaky, cunning, intelligent, but also very kind trainer. She often uses her looks to her advantage, but is also a very skilled battler. At the start of her journey, she stole a Squirtle from Professor Oak, and encounters Red and Green many times as she travels Kanto in the RGB chapter. ~!At the age of five, Blue was kidnapped by Ho-Oh, who was under the command of the Mask of Ice. name: Chocolat
description: A carefree and upbeat girl who claims to have come to Kanade to help free him of his "Absolute Choice" curse. However, ends up having amnesia on arrival and becomes very little help at all. Enjoys sweets and particularly chocolate.

name: Mai Mashiro
description: Mai Mashiro is the female protagonist of Dead Tube. She is a second-year student at Gyotoku Academy and a member of the school's Swimming Club.

name: Maria Ross
description: Second Lieutenant Maria Ross is put in charge of taking care of the Elric brothers during their stay in Central. She and her partner Brosh were assigned the task of guarding the Elrics due to Scar's return in Central and his previous attempt on Ed and Al's lives. Almost immediately, she takes on the role of a parental figure. She tries to give guidance to the brothers whenever she can. She took a liking to Ed and Al, and risked her life to calm Ed down when he was absorbing the red stone materia

name: Mayuri Hanyuu
description: One of the Four Heavenly Queens of Cosplay.

name: Mira Tsubakihara
description: Widow and mother to twin daughters. Her hobby these days is seducing her son-in-law. A MILF weak to kisses.

name: Ryou Marufuji
description: Ryo is the best duelist in Duel Academy. Unlike his little brother (Sho Marufuji) he excels in all dueling forms. He often studies the dueling format with all duelists, and never underestimating his opponent. He uses some of the most powerful Machine Type monsters in the game. name: Sekai Saionji
description: **Height:** 155cm (5’1”) Also in year 1, class 3, she is Makoto's classmate. Sitting next to him in class, she sees the picture that Makoto has secretly taken of Kotonoha on his mobile phone. She then helps him get close to Kotonoha despite harboring strong feelings for him. Even though she is good-natured her emotions overwhelm her in many situations. She lives with her mother in an apartment. Known to be both a cheerful mood-maker and somewhat of a loudmouth. name: Shoujo
description: The only thing that is known about this girl is that she carries and protects a white egg which she believes will hatch one day. She lives in a large building and collects jugs of water for each day she has been there.

name: Shuu Itsuki
description: __Unit:__ Valkyrie __Club:__ Handicraft Club __Circles:__ Dramatica, CRAFTMONSTER Pursuing the path of an idol via fine arts. He is currently active in France. He is a punctual and fussy person, and tends to have a short temper, expressing his emotions in extravagant ways. His singing voice seems to dance with colorful expression, and his performances are both delicate and elegant. He is the leader of Valkyrie under Cosmic Production. name: Yahiko
description: Yahiko was a shinobi from Amegakure and once a student of [Jiraiya](https://anilist.co/character/2423) along with Nagato and [Konan](https://anilist.co/character/3179). Yahiko was orphaned during the Second Shinobi World War, and, thus, he started fending for himself, stealing food from others. He later encountered Konan, also an orphan, and the two began to work together to survive. After this, Konan brought another orphan, Nagato, and his dog, Chibi, into the group. name: Akira Midousuji
description: Midousuji has a sadistic and eccentric personality; he'll do anything to win including constantly causing others emotional distress. He appears to particularly enjoy harassing Imaizumi, but anyone he races against becomes a target of his mind games. Midousuji has a tendency to call others, including his own team members "small fry." His most commonly used phrase seems to be the word "gross." name: Aloe
description: A fairy, owner of the Fairy Nectar brothel.

name: Aoi Sakamoto
description: Aoi is the wife of Tarou Sakamoto and mother of Hana Sakamoto. She met Tarou at a convenience store where he fell in love with Aoi. Soon after the two married and had a daughter. Shortly after meeting, Aoi expressed her feelings about death and convinced Sakamoto to retire as a hitman and not kill anymore.
